case_title: FAST CASH INC. VS O'SULLIVAN, DAVID M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $245.00 FILED BY FAST CASH INC. AS TO DEFENDANT O'SULLIVAN, DAVID M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
